attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.CCMT_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.REQUEST_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.REQUEST_SUB_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.SRC_CM, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.USER_ACTION, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.START_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.END_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.REQUEST_SUBMIT_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.VENDOR_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.VENDOR_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.VENDOR_SITE_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.VENDOR_SITE_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.SUPPLIER_CONTACT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.REQUEST_SOURCE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS,
 (
 select CCMT_HEADER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS
 minus
 select CCMT_HEADER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CCMT_HEADER_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.CCMT_HEADER_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter: SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') and SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) - INTERVAL '5' SECOND FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_SRC_CCMT_HEADERS)
